title: scutellaria lactea
intro: Scutellaria lactea, also known as White Skullcap, is a plant species in the mint family, Lamiaceae, characterized by its white or pale purple flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Scutellaria lactea include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Scutellaria lactea can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
